series_metadata.series_description: Series of written & oral (both English & Interpreted) DL exam tests designed to determine knowledge of motor vehicle laws & highway warning signs. Form HP-86.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain any paper copies for one (1) year from date of test at agency, transfer to ODPS Record Center for two (2) years, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain for three (3) years from date of test., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
